rulings.Case Title: THOMAS RUBINO et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 22, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Cyprus Amax Minerals Co.¿s motion for judgment on the pleadings is denied. For statute of limitations purposes, there is no requirement that a complaint allege that a defendant is sued in a particular capacity, whether individual, as a successor, both or otherwise, at least where, as here, the amendment naming defendant did not disclaim any particular capacity. Thus, the amendment naming defendant in place of a DOE defendant is the relevant pleading for statute of limitations purposes. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RODRICK BRECKLER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON et al

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES DENHAM et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Court'S Own Motion To Vacate The 4/15/11 Entry Of Default As To Defendant Carlin Co And Case Management Conference As To Carlin Co. Hearing Was Ordered At The 6/16/11 Asbestos Case Management Conference.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 22, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Court¿s own motion to vacate the 4/15/11 entry of default as to defendant Carlin Co. Hearing required. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Action On The Grounds Of Forum Non Conveniens
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 22, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Kelly-Moore Paint Co., Inc.¿s motion to stay the action on the grounds of forum non conveniens is granted. Plaintiff did not oppose a stay. The action is stayed until such time as plaintiff has obtained jurisdiction over all defendants in Colorado, Nevada or Utah and, at that time, the case will be dismissed. The 2/16/12 case management conference is vacated. = (220/HEK)
